languages.text: Люди со всех концов Простора Коронус мечтали попасть в ряды меровцев, потому что знали, что служба в 32-ом — пропуск в лучшую жизнь. Но Зарковцы принимали в свои ряды лишь тех, кто хотел по-настоящему посвятить свою судьбу служению династии и ее подданным.

People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.
languages.original_text: Люди со всех концов Простора Коронус мечтали попасть в ряды меровцев, потому что знали, что служба в 32-ом — пропуск в лучшую жизнь. Но Зарковцы принимали в свои ряды лишь тех, кто хотел по-настоящему посвятить свою судьбу служению династии и ее подданным.

traits.locale_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

languages.text: コロナス・エクスパンスから集まった人々は、32番隊に所属すればより良い生活を送れると知っていた。しかしザルコビアンは、王家と臣民のために運命を捧げたいと真摯に願う志願者のみを受け入れた。
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

traits.locale_text: コロナス・エクスパンスから集まった人々は、32番隊に所属すればより良い生活を送れると知っていた。しかしザルコビアンは、王家と臣民のために運命を捧げたいと真摯に願う志願者のみを受け入れた。

languages.text: 科罗努斯扩区的各个角落都有人梦想加入梅罗夫军团，因为他们深知，在第32团服役就是通往美好生活的门票。但扎尔科夫人只接纳那些真心愿意将自己的命运奉献给王朝及其臣民的新兵。
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

traits.locale_text: 科罗努斯扩区的各个角落都有人梦想加入梅罗夫军团，因为他们深知，在第32团服役就是通往美好生活的门票。但扎尔科夫人只接纳那些真心愿意将自己的命运奉献给王朝及其臣民的新兵。

languages.text: Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanından insanlar, 32. Alay'da hizmet etmenin daha iyi bir hayat anlamına geldiğini bildiği için Merovluların safına katılmanın hayalini kuruyordu. Ancak Zarkovlular, yalnızca kaderlerini hanedanlığa ve tebaasına hizmet etmeye içtenlikle adamak isteyen acemileri kabul ediyordu.
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

traits.locale_text: Koronus Enginliği'nin dört bir yanından insanlar, 32. Alay'da hizmet etmenin daha iyi bir hayat anlamına geldiğini bildiği için Merovluların safına katılmanın hayalini kuruyordu. Ancak Zarkovlular, yalnızca kaderlerini hanedanlığa ve tebaasına hizmet etmeye içtenlikle adamak isteyen acemileri kabul ediyordu.

languages.text: En cada rincón de la Extensión de Koronus, la gente soñaba con unirse a los merovianos, ya que servir en el 32.º garantizaba una vida mejor. Sin embargo, la gente de Zarkov solo aceptaba a aquellos reclutas que deseaban sinceramente dedicar su destino a servir a la dinastía y a sus súbditos.
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

traits.locale_text: En cada rincón de la Extensión de Koronus, la gente soñaba con unirse a los merovianos, ya que servir en el 32.º garantizaba una vida mejor. Sin embargo, la gente de Zarkov solo aceptaba a aquellos reclutas que deseaban sinceramente dedicar su destino a servir a la dinastía y a sus súbditos.

languages.text: Des gens aux quatre coins des Étendues de Koronus rêvaient de rejoindre les rangs des Meroviens, conscients que servir le 32e régiment était un moyen sûr d'avoir une meilleure vie. Mais les Zarkoviens n'acceptaient que les recrues qui souhaitaient sincèrement mettre leur vie au service de la dynastie et de ses sujets.
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

traits.locale_text: Des gens aux quatre coins des Étendues de Koronus rêvaient de rejoindre les rangs des Meroviens, conscients que servir le 32e régiment était un moyen sûr d'avoir une meilleure vie. Mais les Zarkoviens n'acceptaient que les recrues qui souhaitaient sincèrement mettre leur vie au service de la dynastie et de ses sujets.

languages.text: Menschen aus allen Teilen der Koronus-Ausdehnung träumten davon, sich den Reihen der Merovianer anzuschließen, da sie wussten, dass ihnen der Dienst im 32. ein besseres Leben bescheren würde. Die Zarkovianer nahmen allerdings nur Rekruten auf, die ihr Leben aufrichtig in den Dienst der Dynastie und ihrer Untertanen stellen wollten.
languages.original_text: People from every corner of the Koronus Expanse dreamed of joining the ranks of the Merovians, as they knew that serving in the 32nd was a ticket to a better life. But the Zarkovians only accepted recruits who sincerely wished to pledge their fate to serving the dynasty and its subjects.

Die Zarkovianer nahmen allerdings nur Rekruten auf, die ihr Leben aufrichtig in den Dienst der Dynastie und ihrer Untertanen stellen wollten.
